sections.heading: JLCCNC Service Update: Price Adjustment for CNC Machining Services
sections.text: JLCCNC Service Update: Price Adjustment for CNC Machining Services Price Update May 08, 2026 Table of Contents Core Reasons for Adjustment Implementation Details Our Commitment to Your Success [May 8, 2026] – To our valued customers and partners, Thank you for your continued trust in JLCCNC. We are dedicated to providing the high-precision, stable, and reliable CNC manufacturing services your projects demand. Following a comprehensive evaluation of current market conditions, JLCCNC will implement a price adjustment for our CNC machining services, effective May 8, 2026 (18:00 UTC+8) . This decision is driven by sustained and significant cost increases in core raw materials and manufacturing...

sections.heading: Core Reasons for Adjustment
sections.text: [May 8, 2026] – To our valued customers and partners, Thank you for your continued trust in JLCCNC. We are dedicated to providing the high-precision, stable, and reliable CNC manufacturing services your projects demand. Following a comprehensive evaluation of current market conditions, JLCCNC will implement a price adjustment for our CNC machining services, effective May 8, 2026 (18:00 UTC+8) . This decision is driven by sustained and significant cost increases in core raw materials and manufacturing consumables. Core Reasons for Adjustment ● Surge in Tooling Costs: The price of Tungsten Powder—the primary raw material for high-performance CNC cutting tools—has surged by 491% year-over-year...
